title: U.S. Senate Committee on Armed Services
description: United States Senate Committee on Armed Services
text:
During each two-year Congress, hundreds of bills and resolutions are referred to the committee. In this section, you’ll find all of the pending legislation that has been referred to the committee.
The committee considers around 50,000 nominations each year for civilian and military officials in the Department of Defense, Army, Navy, Marine Corps, Air Force, and Space Force. Review the status of nominations referred to the Committee here.
